Gold spot (XAU/USD) is **$5,022.10 per troy ounce** right now. ([xau.today](https://xau.today/?utm_source=openai))  
USD→PKR (mid‑market) is about **1 USD = 279.625 PKR**. ([wise.com](https://wise.com/us/compare/best-pkr-exchange-rates?utm_source=openai))

Approx conversions:
- **1 oz:** **$5,022.10** → **PKR 1,404,305**
- **1 gram:** **$161.46** → **PKR 45,148**
- **1 tola:** **$1,883.29** → **PKR 526,615** ([xau.today](https://xau.today/?utm_source=openai))

“Good time to buy”: for **long‑term hedge/saving**, buying in **small chunks over time (DCA)** is usually safer than timing; for **short‑term trading**, it’s riskier (and local Pakistan rates/premiums can differ a lot from spot).
